name: bytedesk
description: ByteDesk's Claude Code marketplace — parallel orchestration, design patterns, Structurizr C4, project management, and platform engineering plugins.

plugins.name: fleet
plugins.description: Parallel multi-session Claude orchestration. Spawn agents on tickets, run them in parallel git worktrees, watch a dashboard, get push notifications when reviews land or merges happen. Hierarchical authorization (ADR-0001) lets parent agents delegate to children safely.

plugins.name: design-patterns
plugins.description: Source-neutral design-pattern advisor with Markdown catalog, MCP tooling, smell scans, and architecture decision support.

plugins.name: project-management
plugins.description: Localized project management and documentation tool (Jira/Confluence equivalent) with MCP support for tasks, sprints, board status, and wiki pages.

plugins.name: structurizr
plugins.description: Enterprise C4 modeling with Structurizr DSL — indexed language reference, CLI/MCP tooling, 32 skills, validation gates, pattern catalog, and cookbook recipes.

plugins.name: platform-dev
plugins.description: ByteDesk core implementation lifecycle — TDD engineer, feature start, PR-ready, worktree operator, architect, grounding, integration branches.

plugins.name: platform-architecture
plugins.description: Structurizr C4 drift gate, partition decomposition facade, ADR authoring.

plugins.name: platform-frontend
plugins.description: ByteDesk Web design system, atomize, browser smoke gate, SignalR realtime.

plugins.name: platform-domain
plugins.description: Bounded-context proof operators — DBA, tool actions, Office workflows, DevProjects, remote gateway.

plugins.name: platform-ops
plugins.description: Production release policy (TeamCity read-only) and Gitflow/Fleet operator.

plugins.name: bytedesk-goals
plugins.description: ByteDesk goal pipeline — goals board, run_goals, plan_goal/plan_epic, Jira/Confluence skills, named-agent dispatch.

plugins.name: omnigent-dev
plugins.description: Omnigent cross-repo engineering — operator, architect, runtime harness, web deploy, API/SDK, agent bundles.
